title: Privileged Execution
description: Use OAL privileged execution for bounded commands that need host privileges, such as Xcode or signing commands. Use when sandboxed execution blocks a required validation or deploy command.
body: Try normal guarded shell first. Privileged execution requires allowlisted command, explicit argv, cwd inside repo or approved target root, and dry-run evidence for request shape. Escalation uses argv form and bounded command classes.
